metadata.title: Why "no family history of PE" needs three axes to mean anything
metadata.topic: Decomposing clinical findings into auditable dimensions
metadata.purpose: The ConText/ShARe three-axis model (presence, temporality, experiencer) decomposes structure clinicians pack into one sentence, so the audit trail can prove what was extracted and why.
metadata.clock: narration (Kokoro am_onyx) — master clock; conform each beat to measured audio
metadata.prerequisites: clinical documentation, structured extraction, assertion taxonomy
metadata.visual_object: A clinical note with three overlaid color-coded bands, one per axis, showing how one sentence spans multiple states.
metadata.hook: A note says "no family history of PE" — is that an absent finding, or a statement about someone else? A flat extractor answers "null"; the right model answers both.

beats.narration_text: A note reads "family history of asthma" and "patient denies current cough." Both collapse to `null` unless you track who experienced what — presence + temporality + experiencer.
beats.scaffold_note: from Key case — cold open on the concrete instance

beats.narration_text: An extractor that nails presence/absence still produces contradictory claims — why? (Flat schemas can't separate "patient denies symptom" from "symptom absent in the patient"; they're different facts.)
A note says "no family history of PE" — is that an absent finding, or a statement about someone else? A flat extractor answers "null"; the right model answers both.
The ConText/ShARe three-axis model (presence, temporality, experiencer) decomposes structure clinicians pack into one sentence, so the audit trail can prove what was extracted and why.
beats.visual: A clinical note with three overlaid color-coded bands, one per axis, showing how one sentence spans multiple states.
beats.scaffold_note: the resolving mechanism; orbits the visual object

beats.narration_text: "Sister had asthma as a child, patient denies cough." Flat: `{family_hx_asthma: null, cough: null}`. Three-axis: `{family_hx_asthma:{present, historical, family}, cough:{absent, current, patient}}`. Same text, readable structure.
The ConText/ShARe three-axis model (presence, temporality, experiencer) decomposes structure clinicians pack into one sentence, so the audit trail can prove what was extracted and why.
